title: Site Data
description: Normalized site-level data for spatial AI modeling workflows.

site_id.description: Stable identifier for the site or prototype project.

site_boundary.description: Ordered boundary points for the full site. Use local coordinates when real coordinates are unavailable.

roads.description: Road or path records used for preview and mobility rules.

road_type.description: Optional road category such as primary, secondary, pedestrian, or service.

parcels.description: Parcel records or parcel IDs. Full parcel objects should follow parcel.schema.json.

coordinate_system.description: Coordinate system note, for example local_xy, projected_crs_unknown, or EPSG code.

notes.description: Human notes about assumptions, missing data, or Rhino/GH setup.
